name: Hook Wars
description: Hook Wars is an immersive 3D combat game where the main objective is to dodge hooks from opponents across the river while attempting to hook them towards your side. Accuracy in targeting is key in this game. Aim to surpass your previous scores with each attempt in this thrilling action-packed game! Website Developer <a href='https://www.onlinegames.io/'>https://www.onlinegames.io/</a>
instructions: Navigate using the WASD keys or the Arrow keys For hooking the avatars employ the left-click As an alternative the space key can also be used for hooking
tags: Action, free games for your website, Online, onlinegames io
